Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class GrantsService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.GrantsService
public class GrantsService extends Object
Service class for managing Grant objects. This service provides an in-memory storage solution for grants and includes methods for grant retrieval, addition, and removal. Each instance of this service manages its own list of grants.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GrantsService()
    Constructs a new GrantsService, initializing an empty list for storing grants.

  • Constructor Details

    • GrantsService

      public GrantsService()
      Constructs a new GrantsService, initializing an empty list for storing grants.

  • Method Details

    • getAllGrants

      public List<Grant> getAllGrants()
      Retrieves all grants currently stored in this service instance.
      Returns:
      A new List<Grant> containing all stored grants. Returns an empty list if no grants are present. This is a copy, so modifications to the returned list do not affect internal storage.

    • addGrant

      public void addGrant(Grant grant)
      Adds a new grant to the in-memory storage for this service instance. If the provided grant is null, or its ID (obtained via getGrantId()) is null or blank, the grant is not added. This implementation allows duplicate grants if their IDs are the same (as List allows duplicates).
      Parameters:
      grant - The Grant object to be added. Must not be null and must have a valid, non-blank ID.

    • removeGrant

      public boolean removeGrant(String grantId)
      Removes a grant from the in-memory storage of this service instance based on its ID. If the provided grant ID is null or blank, no action is taken.
      Parameters:
      grantId - The unique identifier (grant ID) of the grant to be removed.
      Returns:
      true if a grant was removed as a result of this call, false otherwise (including if the grantId is invalid or no such grant was found).

    • clearGrants

      public void clearGrants()
      Clears all grants from the in-memory storage of this service instance. This method is primarily intended for testing purposes to ensure a clean state for a specific service instance.

    • saveGrants

      public void saveGrants() throws IOException
      Saves all grants to the persistent document store.
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to the database fails

    • saveGrants

      public void saveGrants(File companyDirectory) throws IOException
      Saves all grants to the persistent document store.
      Parameters:
      companyDirectory - retained for backwards compatibility but ignored by the method
      Throws:
      IOException - if writing to the database fails

    • loadGrants

      public void loadGrants() throws IOException
      Loads grants from the persistent document store. Existing in-memory grants are cleared before loading new ones.
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading from the database fails

    • loadGrants

      public void loadGrants(File companyDirectory) throws IOException
      Loads grants from the persistent document store. Existing in-memory grants are cleared before loading new ones.
      Parameters:
      companyDirectory - retained for backwards compatibility but ignored by the method
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading from the database fails

    • saveGrantsToZip

      public void saveGrantsToZip(File companyFile) throws IOException
      Legacy API retained for compatibility with callers that previously wrote grants into a company zip file. The implementation now simply persists the current in-memory grants to the shared database via JsonStorageRepository.
      Parameters:
      companyFile - ignored
      Throws:
      IOException - if persisting grants fails

    • loadGrantsFromZip

      public void loadGrantsFromZip(File companyFile) throws IOException
      Legacy API retained for compatibility with callers that previously read grants from a company zip file. The implementation now loads the grants directly from the shared database via JsonStorageRepository.
      Parameters:
      companyFile - ignored
      Throws:
      IOException - if loading grants fails
